chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-29 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 26-02-2024 Syed Murad Ali Shah, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J.,-This application is allowed with consent and the sessions case No.809 of 2021, pending on the file of 1st Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Khairpur is withdrawn from his Court and transferred to the Court of 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur, where main sessions case No.808-A of 2021, arising out of crime No.113 of 2021 registered at P.S, Gambat under sections 302, 147, 148 & 149 PPC, has already been transferred by this court vide order dated 09.10.2023, passed on Crl. Transfer Application No.S-37 of 2023. The Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
